title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: 389-ds-base bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for 389-ds-base is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: 389 Directory Server is an LDAP version 3 (LDAPv3) compliant server. The base packages include the Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) server and command-line utilities for server administration.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Error showing local password policy on web UI [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111230)  AddressSanitizer: memory leak in memberof_add_memberof_attr [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-113982)  The numSubordinates value is not matching the number of direct children. [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117749)  Crash if repl keep alive entry can not be created [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117753)  Exception thrown by dsconf instance repl get_ruv [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117756)  Replication online reinitialization of a large database gets stalled. [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117763)  Statistics about index lookup report a wrong duration [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117766)  When the server restarts after a crash, the RFE assumes memberof should be recomputed. It triggers a memberof fixup task, dirsrv became unresponsive. [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117772)  Ignore the memberOfDeferredUpdate setting when LMDB is used.  [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117784)  Ignore the memberOfDeferredUpdate setting when LMDB is used.  [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-119638)

full_text:
An update for 389-ds-base is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

389 Directory Server is an LDAP version 3 (LDAPv3) compliant server. The base packages include the Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) server and command-line utilities for server administration.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Error showing local password policy on web UI [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111230)  AddressSanitizer: memory leak in memberof_add_memberof_attr [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-113982)  The numSubordinates value is not matching the number of direct children. [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117749)  Crash if repl keep alive entry can not be created [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117753)  Exception thrown by dsconf instance repl get_ruv [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117756)  Replication online reinitialization of a large database gets stalled. [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117763)  Statistics about index lookup report a wrong duration [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117766)  When the server restarts after a crash, the RFE assumes memberof should be recomputed. It triggers a memberof fixup task, dirsrv became unresponsive. [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117772)  Ignore the memberOfDeferredUpdate setting when LMDB is used.  [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-117784)  Ignore the memberOfDeferredUpdate setting when LMDB is used.  [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-119638)
